evals.prompt: I need to import a bunch of product images from URLs into Directus and organize them in a folder
evals.expected_output: Folders create, then files import with URL and metadata including folder UUID
expectations: Uses folders tool with create action first
Uses files tool with import action
Shows data as array with url and file metadata
Includes folder UUID in file metadata
Mentions batch import (multiple items in data array)

evals.prompt: How do I get the actual content of an image file from Directus for AI analysis?
evals.expected_output: Assets tool returns base64 content with mimeType
expectations: Identifies the assets tool (not files tool) for content retrieval
